body:
Replaces CompatHelper with GitHub's native Dependabot support for Julia packages (announced [here](https://discourse.julialang.org/t/psa-github-dependabot-now-supports-julia/134997)).

Changes:
- Add Julia ecosystem to `.github/dependabot.yml`, covering the root environment
- Group all Julia package updates into a single weekly PR (every Wednesday)

See also: CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl#4308
title: ci: use dependabot to update julia packages

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
This pull request simplifies and modernizes the project's Julia code formatting workflow by removing custom formatting scripts and configuration, and switching to the official `JuliaFormatter` tool and its GitHub Action. These changes make code formatting easier to maintain and more consistent across contributors.

## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

**Workflow modernization:**

* Updated `.github/workflows/JuliaFormatter.yml` to use the official `julia-actions/julia-format` GitHub Action, removing custom steps and dependencies on local scripts. This streamlines formatting checks and suggestions for pull requests and merge groups.

**Removal of custom formatting scripts and configuration:**

* Deleted the custom formatter options in `.dev/clima_formatter_options.jl` and removed the `JuliaFormatter` dependency from `.dev/Project.toml`, reducing maintenance overhead for local formatting scripts. [[1]](diffhunk://#diff-68a416071954e36e43fa420761bf1e59cec6f9981e2b2321d1581931cba1b462L1-L8) [[2]](diffhunk://#diff-a4892e90038b14a9f8f68ecb6b403d80c484089f68c8e26891a0e683ea7dcab4L1-L2)
* Deprecated the `.dev/climaformat.jl` script, replacing its functionality with instructions for using `JuliaFormatter` directly. This file will be removed in future releases.

**Formatting configuration update:**

* Added a `.JuliaFormatter.toml` file to define formatting rules for the project, ensuring consistent style across all Julia files using the official formatter.

title: ci: update JuliaFormatter job
